actionUnits.condition: Enter Elevator's BoxCollider (isTrigger=1) to invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter(Collider). MonoBehaviour matches script (guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) and scene component (component fileID: 4942415221793979109). Note: Elevator has no Rigidbody, so the colliding object must have a Rigidbody for Unity to dispatch OnTriggerEnter. Current scene has player field null; expected behavior: method invoked; parenting occurs only if player reference equals this GameObject (Elevator), otherwise no-op.

Exit Elevator's BoxCollider to invoke AttachToElevator.OnTriggerExit(Collider). MonoBehaviour matches script (guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) and scene component (component fileID: 4942415221793979109). Note: Elevator has no Rigidbody, so the exiting object must have a Rigidbody for Unity to dispatch OnTriggerExit. Current scene has player field null; expected behavior: method invoked; un-parenting occurs only if player reference equals this GameObject (Elevator), otherwise no-op.
